first_dialog: Oh no, I am not Mr. McMoneyPants, I just happen to look a lot like him, a lot of people confuse me for him. I'm just the local manager. By the cash register you can see a portrait of McMoneyPants. How may I help you?
Unfortunately no, we likely won't get a shipment for another year at least, the war in Siliconia really messed up the supply chains.
I'm sorry for the disappointment, I know a lot of people were excited about the new Swapdeck. How about this, we can compensate you with a small gift card, valid for all StoreCorp purchases!
You can save it up and also get some extra money on the side doing odd jobs - for instance: mowing lawns. You can claim your gift card outside by the job board.
Now, run along, I need to figure out why our new robot employee is malfunctioning.
player_dialog: Uhm, hi, are you Mr. McMoneyPants?
Are there any Swapdecks available to buy?
possible_dialog: *He's reading the manual for the Robot Employee*
Sorry, I can't help right now, I need to fix the robot.
Hmph, what could possibly be going wrong with this robot?
*He's on the phone calling technical support.*
Ah ha! I think I got it - never mind it's still busted.
